title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server that lets you pull, run, and manage large language models locally with a single command.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python client library for the Ollama API—install from PyPI as "ollama".

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama, published on npm as "ollama".

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain adapter that turns any Ollama model into a drop-in LLM for chains, agents, and RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama with multi-model chats, file uploads, and role-based access.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama built on Retrofit—available on Maven Central.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based TUI that wraps the Ollama REST API for interactive model management in the terminal.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot’s chat sidebar.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG example using Ollama + llama-cpp-python + Chroma to chat with local PDFs.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that exposes Ollama models as slash commands with per-user quotas.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim client library for Ollama with async HTTP and native JSON mapping.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a CI service for testing LLM-powered features in pipelines.

title: ollama-crystal
summary: Crystal language wrapper for Ollama’s REST API with built-in model serialization helpers.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem providing an idiomatic client for Ollama with concurrent streaming support.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir wrapper that exposes Ollama models as GenServer processes for fault-tolerant chats.

title: ollama-zig
summary: Zig client for Ollama using std.http with compile-time JSON parsing.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Async Rust crate for Ollama with Tokio and native SSE streaming support.

title: ollama-dart
summary: Dart/Flutter package for talking to Ollama, enabling on-device LLM chats in mobile apps.
